message:
chore: add .codex-target-*/ to .gitignore

Ignore Codex CLI ephemeral target directories that are generated during
codex doctor runs and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -257,3 +257,6 @@ ubs-output.txt
 
 # Release build artifacts
 release-artifacts/
+
+# Codex CLI ephemeral target directories
+.codex-target-*/
